text_excerpt: Campaigns | Rt Hon John Glen MP Skip to main content Main navigation About John Glen News In Salisbury Issues In Parliament Contact Campaigns Preserving the Environment Preserving the environment is not a partisan issue. Championing Innovation and Connectivity Building an economy fit for the twenty-first century requires universal access to ultrafast fibre broadband. I was thrilled that Openreach selected Salisbury to... Transport Growing the local economy here in South Wiltshire requires more than boosting skills. We need to secure new investment in roads, rail and telecommunications to...
